message:
Add auth-scoped idempotency keys and code quality improvements

idempotency.ts - Auth-scoped idempotency keys:
- Add getIdempotencyScopeKey() to extract user/apiKey/workspace context
- Add getScopedIdempotencyKey() to prefix idempotency keys with scope
- Prevents cross-user cache collisions for same idempotency key
- Keys include: admin status, userId, apiKeyId, sorted workspaceIds
- Stable sorting ensures same context yields same scope key

idempotency.middleware.test.ts:
- Add tests for auth-scoped idempotency behavior

dashboard.service.ts:
- Fix return type formatting for splitPermissions
- Improve conditional formatting for sharing permissions

pipeline.service.ts:
- Related service improvements

url-security.test.ts:
- Updated test assertions

Frontend components:
- CostForecastChart.tsx, CostTrendChart.tsx: Remove redundant props
- SafetyPosturePanel.tsx: Minor cleanup
- MobileAgentCard.tsx: Fix indentation throughout component
- websocket-context.tsx: Minor updates

Also includes routine beads metadata updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
